references.author: J Shi
references.unstructured: Shi, J. et al. Active biointegrated living electronics for managing inflammation. Science 384, 1023–1030 (2024). This paper reports a biointegrated living device that wirelessly records electrical signals from the skin surface and improves disease treatment in a mouse model of psoriasis.

references.author: D Yin
references.unstructured: Yin, D. et al. A battery-free nanofluidic intracellular delivery patch for internal organs. Nature 642, 1051–1061 (2025).
